nasb.text: And it had been revealed to him by the Holy Spirit that he would not see death before he had seen the Lord’s Christ.

esv.text: And it had been revealed to him by the Holy Spirit that he would not see death before he had seen the Lord’s Christ.

cnv.text: 聖靈啟示他，在死前必得見主所應許的基督，

ccb.text: 圣灵曾启示他：他去世前必能亲眼看见主所立的基督。

csbs.text: 他得了圣灵的启示：自己在经历死亡以前会看见主的基督。
